outputData.value: <math xmlns='http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML' display='block' xmlns:mw='https://www.mathworks.com/MathML/extensions'> <mrow mw:template='plus' mw:dataCategory='structure'> <mrow form='infix' mw:dataCategory='static'>⁢</mo> <mi>b</mi> </mrow> </mrow> </mrow> </mrow> <mo form='postfix' mw:dataCategory='static'>)</mo> </mrow> </mrow> <mo>-</mo> <mrow mw:template='times' <mi>a</mi> <mo>-</mo> <mi>x</mi> </mrow> </mrow> </mfenced> <mo form='infix' mw:dataCategory='static'>⁢</mo> <mfenced mw:dataCategory='structure-part'> <mrow mw:template='plus' outputData.name: ans
